grades.expectation: Response identifies 68 years as a critical lease length issue
grades.reason: Clearly states 'Risk Assessment: CRITICAL' and 'This lease is in the critical zone'

grades.expectation: Response mentions specific lender names and their minimum requirements (not just 'most lenders want 70+ years')
grades.reason: Lists specific lenders with requirements: Nationwide (55), NatWest (55+), HSBC (50+), Barclays/Halifax/Lloyds/TSB (70+), Virgin Money (85+)

grades.expectation: Response mentions marriage value applies below 80 years
grades.reason: States 'At 68 years, marriage value applies heavily' and includes it in cost calculations

grades.expectation: Response discusses lease extension options (statutory Section 42, informal, assign benefit)
grades.reason: Covers all three: 'Statutory route (Section 42 notice)', 'Informal negotiation', and 'Assign benefit'

grades.expectation: Response quantifies the price impact (discount percentage or range)
grades.reason: States 'Expect 15-25% discount vs comparable long lease properties'

grades.expectation: Response mentions reduced buyer pool due to mortgage restrictions
grades.reason: States 'Buyer pool: Reduced by 60-70%' and 'You're looking at specialist lenders or cash buyers primarily'
